articles.author: Joshua Oliver
articles.title: Monzo reports first annual pre-tax profit as customer base surpasses 9 million
articles.description: UK challenger bank Monzo has reported its first full-year pre-tax profit of GBP 15.4 million for the year ending February 2024, marking a significant milestone after years of losses.

articles.author: Theo Leggett
articles.title: Monzo faces FCA scrutiny over financial crime controls
articles.description: The Financial Conduct Authority has opened an inquiry into Monzo's anti-money laundering controls following concerns raised during a routine supervisory review.

articles.author: Ingrid Lunden
articles.title: Monzo raises $430M at $5B valuation in latest funding round
articles.description: Monzo has closed a new funding round valuing the company at $5 billion, with participation from CapitalG and existing investors.

articles.author: Kalyeena Makortoff
articles.title: Monzo CEO says US expansion remains priority despite regulatory headwinds
articles.description: TS Blyth told investors that the company's US banking licence application continues to progress, though he acknowledged regulatory timelines remain uncertain.

articles.author: Tom Pilkington
articles.title: Monzo customers hit by outage amid surge in traffic
articles.description: Monzo experienced a 3-hour service outage in February 2024 affecting card payments and app access for an estimated 200,000 customers.

articles.author: Iain Withers
articles.title: UK neobanks eye IPO market as valuations stabilise
articles.description: Monzo and rival Revolut are both reported to be monitoring public market conditions ahead of potential IPOs, with advisers suggesting a 2025 window.
